name: Fletcher Kelly
bio: Hi! I'm Fletcher, and I like building useful things with cloud, code, and a bit of chaos.
intro: I'm a cloud engineer focused on Azure, automation, and practical tooling that helps teams move faster without the drama.
details: Outside work, you'll usually find me experimenting with home automation, tuning 3D printer setups, testing new workflows, and sharing what works (and what definitely did not).
